titleStmt.title: SII 10.572: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 572. (A.R. Nos. 538, 539 and 540 of 1909.) ON A PILLAR IN THE RUINED MAṆḌAPA CALLED VARAHĀLAKOṬṬU, KONḌAVĪḌU, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1327. (Pārthiva)

summary.p: Portions are incomplete. These little inscriptions state that certain stone pillars (stambhas) were put up by certain persons. They contain no historical information.

Note:—This is a batch of 15 small inscriptions. In the Annual Report on Epigraphy, Madras, these are treated as constituting three inscriptions but really each one of them is a separate inscription. Nine of them are illegible owing to the roughness of the surface of the stone. I treat the rest as parts of one and the same inscription and transcribe them below.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakavarṣaṁbulu
1327 Agu nēṇṭṭiki pārdhi
vasaṁvatsara Āśvayuja śu 10
va viśvēsvaradēvara gōpurānakudaṁ
mālapāṭi cennamanēningāru
tamaguruvulu niluvungannulu
vaḍasena paṁḍitāĀrādhyadēvara
manumalu śrīgiriAyyaṁgāri
kiṁ buṇyamugāṁ jēiṁccina

svasti śrīmatu visvasvara
dēvaramaṁḍapaṁ paddepe
ddiseṭṭi tamapinataṁḍri
gauriseṭṭiki puṁyangānu

svasti śrīmatu visvēsvara
dēvaramaṁḍapānaku Ane
maliseṭṭikoḍuku vīra
maliseṭṭi tamapina
taṁḍri Aniseṭṭikini
banisānikini kēśuvagāni
kini puṇyaṁgā cēyi
ṁcina staṁbhamu

svasti śrīmatuvi
śvēśvaradēvaramaṁḍapā
naku ko reḍḍi
tamataṁḍri gaṁgire
ḍḍikini kāmasāniki
ni puṇyaṁgā cēyi
ṁcina kaṁbhamu

śikhāśritadyu
pedakōmaṭi
vēmavibhō rmānyō bhaṁḍāri rā
manānāmā . nijamātulasya rāṇa
sāhāripurāya baṁdicōḍasya pu
ṇyāya stāpitavā natra śilāviśvapatigṛ
hēstaṁbha

svasti śrīmatu viśvēśvaradēva
rasiṁhāsanamaṁḍapāna
ku śrī gōtruṁḍu satya
navali peddiseṭṭi tamapinata
ṁḍri ni seṭṭikini
sānikini puṇyaṁgā cē
yiṁcina staṁbhamu
Digital edition of SII 10.572 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
